title: runtime_defaults
description: Default LLM backend and model that compiled skills use at runtime. Edited by users; read by the compile pipeline. The values are baked into each compiled skill's config.py as the BACKEND and MODEL_ID constants.

backend.description: Which inference backend to use. Currently only 'ollama' works — picking anything else causes 'Backend name X unknown' at runtime. Add new values to this enum as mellea adds support for them.

model_id.description: Model name passed to the backend (e.g. 'granite3.3:8b' for ollama). The model must be available in the user's runtime environment — the schema does not validate availability.

_comment.description: Optional human-readable note. Ignored by the compile pipeline.
